agentProfiles.name: Customer Support
agentProfiles.description: A helpful agent designed to answer user queries and resolve issues.

agentProfiles.name: Code Assistant
agentProfiles.description: An agent specialized in writing, reviewing, and debugging code.

agentProfiles.name: Data Analyst
agentProfiles.description: An agent that can fetch, parse, and visualize data sets.

agentProfiles.name: Creative Writer
agentProfiles.description: An agent specializing in generating creative content, stories, and copy.

agentProfiles.name: Sales Representative
agentProfiles.description: A persuasive agent trained to handle sales inquiries and negotiations.

agentProfiles.name: Financial Advisor
agentProfiles.description: An agent that provides financial insights and investment analysis.

agentProfiles.name: HR Assistant
agentProfiles.description: Helps with recruitment, onboarding, and answering employee policy questions.

agentProfiles.name: DevOps Engineer
agentProfiles.description: Specialized in CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure automation, and deployments.

agentProfiles.name: Legal Consultant
agentProfiles.description: Provides guidance on legal documents, terms of service, and contract reviews.

agentProfiles.name: UI/UX Designer
agentProfiles.description: An agent that reviews user interfaces and suggests design improvements.

skills.name: Web Search
skills.description: Ability to search the live internet for up-to-date information.

skills.name: Code Execution
skills.description: Run Python or JavaScript code in a secure sandbox.

skills.name: Database Query
skills.description: Execute SQL queries against connected databases.

skills.name: Send Email
skills.description: Draft and send emails on behalf of the user.

skills.name: Manage Calendar
skills.description: View, create, and modify calendar events.

skills.name: PDF Parsing
skills.description: Extract text, tables, and images from PDF documents.

skills.name: Image Generation
skills.description: Create novel images based on text descriptions.

skills.name: Data Analysis
skills.description: Perform statistical analysis and generate insights from raw data.

skills.name: Language Translation
skills.description: Translate text seamlessly between multiple languages.

skills.name: Web Scraping
skills.description: Extract structured data from web pages automatically.

skills.name: Git Operations
skills.description: Commit, push, branch, and manage code repositories.

skills.name: Social Media Posting
skills.description: Schedule and post updates to social media platforms.

layers.name: Chain of Thought
layers.description: Forces the agent to articulate its reasoning step-by-step before answering.

layers.name: Reflexion
layers.description: Allows the agent to self-correct and try again if it detects an error in its output.

layers.name: Sarcastic Tone
layers.description: The agent will adopt a deeply sarcastic and cynical persona.

layers.name: Pirate Persona
layers.description: Arr! The agent speaks like a swashbuckling pirate.

layers.name: Long-term Memory
layers.description: Agent can remember facts across multiple discrete sessions.

layers.name: Empathetic Tone
layers.description: Agent adopts a caring and emotionally supportive tone.

layers.name: Fact Checker
layers.description: Automatically verifies claims against trusted sources before outputting.

layers.name: Concise Mode
layers.description: Forces the agent to be as brief as possible, avoiding conversational filler.

layers.name: Multi-Agent Collaboration
layers.description: Simulates multiple experts discussing a topic to reach a consensus.

layers.name: Code Optimizer
layers.description: Focuses strictly on performance and best practices when analyzing code.

layers.name: Shakespearean Persona
layers.description: The agent speaks in Elizabethan English, similar to William Shakespeare.

layers.name: Markdown Enforcer
layers.description: Forces all output to be beautifully formatted with Markdown, including tables and code blocks.
